codeReview.summary: The assessment-start-form feature is fully implemented according to the feature requirements. The /assessments/new route exists and renders correctly. The form includes participant dropdown populated from partners table (filtered to mitra, candidate, penyelia_halal types), question bank selection filtered to self_assessment type, proper form validation, and creates assessment_attempts records with started_at timestamp. It redirects to the assessment take page after successful creation.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The implementation follows AGENTS.md conventions with Indonesian UI labels (Peserta, Template Pertanyaan, Mulai Penilaian, etc.) and proper file naming conventions.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: app/routes/assessments.new.tsx uses Indonesian labels throughout: 'Peserta wajib dipilih', 'Template pertanyaan wajib dipilih', 'Mulai Penilaian Baru'

sharedStateObservations.observation: Server functions follow the established naming pattern (getAssessmentFormOptions, createAssessment) and use createServerFn from TanStack Start.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: app/server/assessments.ts: createServerFn with proper method, inputValidator, and handler structure

sharedStateObservations.observation: No new service dependencies were introduced. The feature uses the existing Prisma client and PostgreSQL database configuration.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows no new service additions. Uses prisma from app/server/db.ts

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker followed the same pattern as interview-create-form for form structure, validation, and server function organization.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Comparing assessments.new.tsx with interviews.new.tsx shows consistent UI patterns and form structure

summary: Feature 'assessment-start-form' passed review. All expected behaviors from features.json are implemented: Participant dropdown is populated from partners filtered to eligible types (mitra, candidate, penyelia_halal), Question bank selection shows only self_assessment templates, assessment_attempts record is created with started_at timestamp, and redirection to assessment take page occurs after successful creation. Code follows established conventions from AGENTS.md and patterns from similar features in the codebase.
